{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193601B3835128AA4FF1669500"}"},"total":261},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601876801161298712","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爱看多看，明明是娇妻文学但没有尴尬抠脚的剧情，特别甜，甜的我反复观看，修罗场刺激，男主也很直接，总之一句话，爱看甜文的闭眼入好吗？[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":40,"s":37,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265761F1669500%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227601876801161298712%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227594039525798595646%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769951577,"group_id":"7594039525798595646","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"青春兵荒马乱，未来星河璀璨","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxedZIdciee/hxbmHJdY7depOprMKJ10JmVSbNXa5ED3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/54f577b34c834c2d90c451f17c281a5f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788825&x-signature=m2xVQ%2B5q%2BTbS99URh0hEcUP%2FzzI%3D","user_id":"1711318749422739","user_name":"爱喝乾汁的晚清吖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1711318749422739","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594039525798595646","book_info":{"abstract":"【正文完结】
【电竞+万人迷+软妹+团宠+1Vn多男主+雄竞】
为了偿还父亲留下的五百万债务，秦绵绵签约著名的疯狗战队KOG，成了一名生活领队。
入职第一天，她就被吓哭。
本以为这群享誉电竞圈的男神，一个比一个难伺候。
殊不知，她那副软萌撒娇的样子，早就把这群桀骜不驯的少年拿捏得死死的。
……
随着时间流逝，事情变得不对劲起来——
那个号称生人勿近的暴躁野王队长，竟然在比赛休息间隙，一把将领队揽到身前，拧开瓶盖递过去时，指腹暧昧地摩挲过她的嘴角：“没我照顾你可怎么办？”
而那个斯文败类的下路，在某次秦绵绵被路人撞到后，当场冷脸把人护在身后：“长不长眼？我们家领队也是你能碰的？”
直到全明星周末，隔壁战队的温柔队长向秦绵绵抛出橄榄枝：
“绵绵，KOG那群人太粗鲁了，来我这里吧，工资随你开，绝不凶你。”
秦绵绵有些心动，刚要开口。
一只滚烫的大手将她猛地拽回了KOG的休息区。
“你敢走试试？”
“嫌我脾气差？行，我改，以后奖杯给你，钱给你，命都给你，不许看别人……”
身后，原本懒散的KOG全员齐刷刷站了起来，将她圈在领地中央：
“进了我们队，这辈子都是我们的小祖宗。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ef33cae8a311e740a025605c32cfb8e1","author":"美味土豆千种吃法","author_id":"","book_id":"7594039525798595646","book_name":"说是战队保姆，全员都想亲我！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":486,"name":"明星","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=486&name=明星&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594040109033341502","read_count":"35519","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"554543"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"219","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,宠妻,团宠,明星,电竞","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0fcbe846ec264c8b198dd01b35c0a605~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449761&x-signature=KrHdYbPdl0Z30RZnIqcKN3wESrQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2183010353941968","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"187"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193601B3835128AA4FF1669500"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"l
